DESCRIPTION.en: Use to unlock new Worlds and travel to other times!
DESCRIPTION.zh: 用于解锁新的世界，并开启新的时空之旅！

DESCRIPTION.en: You have defeated Dr. Zomboss' creation, the Zombot Sphinx-inator.
DESCRIPTION.zh: 你已击败了僵尸博士的杰作，狮身人面降临者。

DESCRIPTION.en: You have defeated Dr. Zomboss' creation, the Zombot Plank Walker.
DESCRIPTION.zh: 你已击败了僵尸博士的杰作，甲板漫步者。

DESCRIPTION.en: You have defeated Dr. Zomboss' creation, the Zombot War Wagon.
DESCRIPTION.zh: 你已击败了僵尸博士的杰作，重型战马车。

DESCRIPTION.en: You have defeated Dr. Zomboss' creation, the Zombot Tomorrow-tron.
DESCRIPTION.zh: 你已击败了僵尸博士的杰作，明日缔造者。

DESCRIPTION.en: You have defeated Dr. Zomboss' creation, the Zombot Dark Dragon.
DESCRIPTION.zh: 你已击败了僵尸博士的杰作，巨龙驾驭者。

DESCRIPTION.en: You have defeated Dr. Zomboss' creation, the Zombot Sharktronic Sub.
DESCRIPTION.zh: 你已击败了僵尸博士的杰作，巨鲨号深潜艇。

DESCRIPTION.en: You have defeated Dr. Zomboss' creation, the Zombot Tuskmaster 10,000 BC.
DESCRIPTION.zh: 你已击败了僵尸博士的杰作，獠牙征服者。

DESCRIPTION.en: You have defeated Dr. Zomboss' invention, the Zombot Aerostatic Gondola.
DESCRIPTION.zh: 你已击败了僵尸博士的发明，热气球浮舰。

DESCRIPTION.en: You have defeated Dr. Zomboss’ creation, the Zombot Multi-stage Masher.
DESCRIPTION.zh: 你已击败了僵尸博士的杰作，节奏引领者。

DESCRIPTION.en: You have defeated Dr. Zomboss' creation, the Zombot Dinotronic Mechasaur.
DESCRIPTION.zh: 你已击败了僵尸博士的杰作，恐龙支配者。

NAME.en: Taco With a Waffle In It

DESCRIPTION.en: You have acquired a taco with a waffle in it!
DESCRIPTION.zh: 你得到了一块装着华夫饼的玉米卷！

NAME.en: Access to the Pyramid of Doom!

DESCRIPTION.en: Survive level after level of escalating zombie attacks. Test your skills in this Endless Zone.
DESCRIPTION.zh: 在一波又一波愈演愈烈的僵尸攻势中生存下来，在此无尽空间中挑战你的极限。

DESCRIPTION.zh: 用于掩盖玉米卷里没熟的肉的腥味。

DESCRIPTION.en: A parchment of ancient lands, with cosmic implications.
DESCRIPTION.zh: 一张古老土地的羊皮卷，蕴含着宇宙层面的深意。
